probe_command: gh pr view 1788 --json state; grep -c -- '--refresh-package' docker/Dockerfile.runtime; uv run pytest tests/scripts/test_dockerfile_runtime_git_refresh.py -q; docker run --rm --entrypoint sh <stability-test-image>:latest -c 'grep -c OMN-12420 .../node_dod_verify/contract.yaml'
probe_stdout: {"total": 4, "verified": 4, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0, "details": [{"id": "dod-infra-pr-open", "description": "omnibase_infra PR #1788 exists with the OMN-12424 Dockerfile fix", "status": "verified", "message": "OK: gh pr view 1788 -> {number:1788, state:OPEN}"}, {"id": "dod-dockerfile-refresh-package", "description": "Dockerfile.runtime passes --refresh-package for moving-ref git installs", "status": "verified", "message": "OK: grep -c '--refresh-package onex-change-control'=1, grep -c '--refresh-package omnimarket'=1"}, {"id": "dod-static-test", "description": "test_dockerfile_runtime_git_refresh pins the invariant and passes", "status": "verified", "message": "OK: 4 passed in 0.40s"}, {"id": "dod-image-precheck", "description": "rebuilt stability-test image provably contains the merged OMN-12420 change", "status": "verified", "message": "OK: docker run grep -c OMN-12420 on installed node_dod_verify/contract.yaml == 1 (pre-fix image returned 0); runtime_sha_verify removed; event_model present"}]}
